# task\-phase9\-validation\-import\-hardening — Harden validation for migrated and imported records
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-core

Strengthen validation and import\-facing rules for records produced by migrations or external systems\. Focus on filename/id safety, dangling references, status/priority mappings, and imported text that later flows into generated reports or views\.

## Acceptance
- Record ids that become filenames are constrained or validated so path traversal and unsafe filenames are rejected\.
- Migration\-relevant references such as dependencies, scopes, prompts, message threads, and issue/task links produce clear diagnostics when invalid\.
- GitHub/import mapping edge cases are reviewed and documented or tested where appropriate\.
- docs/migration\-guide\.md reflects any new validation rules an LLM or human migrator must follow\.
- bun test, typecheck, biome check, waystation validate, and rebuilt binary smoke checks are green\.
